zh.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas是James Dundas 11th of dundas和Christian Stewart的女兒，於大約1385年出生在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire登達斯 卡素。她於1399年與Alexander Livingstone of Callendar在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波特 登達斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安米德 考爾德享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas是James Dundas 11th of dundas和Christian Stewart的女儿，于大约1385年出生在苏格兰Linlithgowshire登達斯 卡素。她于1399年与Alexander Livingstone of Callendar在苏格兰藍納可爾波特 登達斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安米德 考爾德享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾卡藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Dundas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Midlothian) and Irish (Fermanagh): habitational name from Dundas, a place near Edinburgh, Scotland, which is named from Gaelic dùn ‘hill’ + deas ‘south’.
History: A family of this name is descended from Gospatrick, Earl of March (died 1139), whose grandson was Helia de Dundas.

en.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas was born about 1385, in Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland as the daughter of James Dundas 11th of dundas and Christian Stewart. She married Alexander Livingstone of Callendar in 1399, in Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1459, in Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas est née environ 1385, à Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, fille de James Dundas 11th of dundas et Christian Stewart. Elle a épousé Alexander Livingstone of Callendar en 1399, à Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Mid Calder, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Callander, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas wurde um 1385 in Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, als Tochter von James Dundas 11th of dundas und Christian Stewart geboren. Sie hat 1399 in Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland Alexander Livingstone of Callendar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Mid Calder, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Alexander Livingstone of Callendar nel 1399, nel Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1459, nel Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundasは約1385年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireダンダス カストルでJames Dundas 11th of dundasとChristian Stewartの娘として生まれた。1399年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアポルト ダンダスでAlexander Livingstone of Callendarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンミド カルダーで75歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカランダーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas(은)는 대략 1385년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 던다스 카스틀에서 James Dundas 11th of dundas(와)과 Christian Stewart의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1399년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 포트 던다스에서 Alexander Livingstone of Callendar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 미드 캘더에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘랜더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Dundas Castle, Linlithgowshire, Scotland filha de James Dundas 11th of dundas e Christian Stewart. Ela casou-se com Alexander Livingstone of Callendar em 1399, em Port Dundas, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1459, em Mid Calder, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ro.Castle Calder, West Lothian, Scotland: Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: 'unknown' Dundas родилась около 1385 г. в местности дундас кастл, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия. Её родителей звали James Dundas 11th of dundas и Christian Stewart. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Livingstone of Callendar в 1399 г. в местности порт дундас, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности мид калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности калландир, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

Murió en 1459, en Mid Calder, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
